exercises.sentence: Cada lunes, yo ____ mi ropa sucia a la lavandería.
exercises.translation: Every Monday, I take my dirty laundry to the laundromat.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ mis libros en una mochila azul para ir a clase.
exercises.translation: I carry my books in a blue backpack to go to class.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ las llaves del coche en el bolsillo de mi chaqueta.
exercises.translation: I carry the car keys in my jacket pocket.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ____ tú esos zapatos tan incómodos hoy?
exercises.translation: Why are you wearing those very uncomfortable shoes today?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ una vida muy saludable con mucho ejercicio.
exercises.translation: You lead a very healthy life with a lot of exercise.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ____ tú en esa bolsa de plástico?
exercises.translation: What are you carrying in that plastic bag?

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo ____ a mi hermana al aeropuerto en mi coche.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I took my sister to the airport in my car.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ una corbata negra para la entrevista de trabajo.
exercises.translation: I wore a black tie for the job interview.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ los platos sucios a la cocina después de comer.
exercises.translation: I carried the dirty dishes to the kitchen after eating.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ____ tú una chaqueta si hace mucho calor?
exercises.translation: Why did you wear a jacket if it is very hot?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ a tu perro al veterinario el mes pasado.
exercises.translation: You took your dog to the veterinarian last month.

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ el pastel a la fiesta de cumpleaños de Juan.
exercises.translation: You brought the cake to Juan's birthday party.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ____ el pelo largo y rizado.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I used to have long curly hair.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ siempre un cuaderno a todas las reuniones.
exercises.translation: I always carried a notebook to all the meetings.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ una vida tranquila en el campo hace años.
exercises.translation: I used to lead a quiet life in the countryside years ago.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ____ tú puesto cuando te encontré ayer?
exercises.translation: What were you wearing when I met you yesterday?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ a los niños al parque todos los domingos.
exercises.translation: You used to take the children to the park every Sunday.

exercises.sentence: Antes ____ tú una dieta muy estricta por salud.
exercises.translation: Before, you used to follow a very strict diet for health.

exercises.sentence: Si fuera tú, yo ____ a mis padres a ese restaurante nuevo.
exercises.translation: If I were you, I would take my parents to that new restaurant.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ este abrigo formal si tuviera una cita importante.
exercises.translation: I would wear this formal coat if I had an important date.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ el equipo técnico conmigo por si acaso ocurre un error.
exercises.translation: I would carry the technical equipment with me in case an error occurs.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú a tu familia de vacaciones a la playa este verano?
exercises.translation: Would you take your family on vacation to the beach this summer?

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ____ tú puesto para una boda elegante en invierno?
exercises.translation: What would you wear to an elegant wedding in winter?

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú el paraguas si supieras que va a llover?
exercises.translation: Would you carry the umbrella if you knew it was going to rain?

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo ____ las maletas al hotel antes de registrarme.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will carry the suitcases to the hotel before checking in.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ a mi hija a su clase de natación a las diez.
exercises.translation: I will take my daughter to her swimming lesson at ten.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ mis documentos importantes a la notaría la próxima semana.
exercises.translation: I will take my important documents to the notary next week.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú los refrescos a la reunión de mañana?
exercises.translation: Will you bring the sodas to the meeting tomorrow?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ una ropa elegante para la fiesta de graduación.
exercises.translation: You will wear elegant clothes for the graduation party.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú a tu hermano al médico por la tarde?
exercises.translation: Will you take your brother to the doctor in the afternoon?
